calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Property
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa, via ZOOM, for Christine Morgan, Successor Trustee.

The court questions if venue for this matter is proper. Counsel reports that the principal location of administration is his office which is located San Francisco and that all mail regarding this matter is sent to his office. Counsel reports that he does not anticipate issues with creditors and that typically, this is how his firm handles matters where there is a non-professional trustee and that earlier this year, this court granted a petition in a similar case. The court advises counsel that things have recently changed and matters regarding venue are begin heavily scrutinized. Counsel offers additional testimony in support of his petition. The court then advises counsel to review the proposed order submitted to the court as the financial institution listed lists only the last four digits of the account. Counsel reports that he plans to submit a new proposed order.

The Petition for Order Determining Title to Property is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
